title: 1.1: Converts the global tx logger list from a single flat structure to a per-application-protocol organization in `src/output-tx.c`
1.2: Updates `OutputRegisterTxLogger` to insert each logger into a per-protocol list indexed by its `alproto` parameter
1.3: Converts the per-thread logger store in `OutputLoggerThreadData` from a single chain to a per-protocol structure
1.4: Handles wildcard loggers (`ALPROTO_UNKNOWN`) separately from protocol-specific loggers in the `OutputTxLog` logging path
1.5: Skips to the next transaction after wildcard processing when protocol-specific loggers are absent for the current flow's protocol
1.6: Simplifies the per-logger condition in the protocol-specific logging loop by removing the runtime protocol matching check

1.7: Updates all 5 lifecycle functions (`OutputTxLogThreadInit`, `OutputTxLogThreadDeinit`, `OutputTxLogExitPrintStats`, `OutputTxLoggerGetActiveCount`, `OutputTxShutdown`) to iterate per-protocol logger lists
4.1: Removes wildcard logger (`ALPROTO_UNKNOWN`) invocation from the transaction logging path
4.2: Modifies any of the 3 public function signatures declared in `src/output-tx.h` (`OutputRegisterTxLogger`, `OutputTxLoggerRegister`, `OutputTxShutdown`)
4.3: Removes or breaks the `tx_logged` tracking that prevents duplicate logger invocations within a single transaction
